seed_justification.method: sha256 of measured anchor tuples (accuracy, latency, deal_safety, label)
seed_justification.supabase_note: CSV rows are also written to public.rsi_runs when SUPABASE_DB_PW is set on the EC2 nightly cycle. This seed mirrors those measured values so the dashboard works without DB credentials.
